# AskMiro Cleaning Services

> Professional managed commercial cleaning company based in London, UK.
> Founded by Mike Kato. Serving businesses across London and surrounding areas since 2020.

AskMiro provides fully managed, contract-based commercial cleaning services for businesses in London. All staff are DBS-checked, BICSc-trained, uniformed, and insured. Fixed monthly rates with no hidden charges. £10M public liability insurance. COSHH-compliant.

## Contact

- Website: https://askmiro.co.uk
- Phone: 020 8073 0621
- Email: info@askmiro.com
- Address: London, UK
- Director / Co-Founder: Mike Kato

## Services

### Office & Commercial Cleaning
Daily, weekly or tailored cleaning schedules for offices, co-working spaces and business parks across London. Includes desk sanitisation, kitchen and washroom cleaning, waste removal, vacuuming and mopping. Out-of-hours and weekend cleaning available.

### End of Tenancy Cleaning
Full property deep clean to letting agency and landlord standard. Covers kitchen appliances, bathrooms, carpets, windows and all rooms. Meets or exceeds most letting agency inventory requirements.

### Deep Cleaning
One-off intensive cleans for properties requiring thorough attention. Post-construction cleans, post-event cleaning, and periodic deep cleans for maintained premises.

### Residential Block & Communal Area Cleaning
Lobbies, lifts, stairwells, corridors and communal spaces. Works with property management companies, housing associations, RTM companies and freeholders.

### Specialist Sector Cleaning
- Medical & healthcare facilities (clinical-grade, colour-coded equipment)
- Schools and educational establishments (term-time and holiday deep cleans)
- Automotive dealerships and showrooms
- Warehouses and logistics facilities
- Commercial kitchens and catering environments
- Retail and hospitality venues
- Data centres (specialist static-safe cleaning)
- Gyms and fitness centres

## Why Businesses Choose AskMiro

- Dedicated account manager included on every contract
- Regular quality audits with written reports
- Re-clean guarantee — if something is missed, we return at no charge
- Eco-friendly and plant-based product options available on request
- Flexible scheduling including evenings and weekends
- TUPE-experienced for contract transitions
- All quotes provided within 24–48 hours, site visits within the week

## Coverage Area

London and surrounding areas including: Central London, North London, South London, East London, West London, and surrounding counties.

## Certifications & Standards

- BICSc (British Institute of Cleaning Science) trained staff
- COSHH (Control of Substances Hazardous to Health) compliant
- £10M public liability insurance
- DBS-checked workforce
